title: Cisco VoIP - Supported Cisco Phones, Headsets and Misc Accessories
body: How to Purchase VoIP Equipment When purchasing desk phones and miscellaneous accessories from ShopUW+, please do the following: Navigate to Workday and login From the Navigation Menu , select Organization | Procurement & AP UW Under MDS Core Stock , select the Request from Inventory link Edit your Requisition Details on the right side pane with the following options: Requesting Entity - MDS Core Stock Requisition Type - 1 CATALOG - ShopUW & University Warehouse Save changes Search "Cisco VoIP" in the search text box that says "Search for Goods and Services" When purchasing headsets from ShopUW+, please do the following: Navigate to Workday and login From the Navigation Menu , select Organization | Procurement & AP UW Under Connect to ShopU... , select the Request Catalog Items & Access ShopU... link Select Connect on the ShopUW+ row Under IT Supplies | IT Suppliers , choose your preferred supplier We recommend using B&H Photo or CDW as these vendors have quick delivery times and discounted deals Search for the Jabra or Cisco headsets that are listed below Standard Cisco Desktop Telephones Cisco 7811 (black and white display) Cisco 7841 (black and white display) Cisco 8851 (color display) Technical Details Features Model #7811 Model #7841 Model #8851 Screen 3.28-inch B/W display 3.5-inch B/W display 5-inch color display # of lines 1 4 5 (41 w/ optional sidecar) Speakerphone Yes Yes Yes Hearing Aid Compatible Yes Yes Yes USB Headset/external speaker No No Yes Bluetooth No No Yes Sidecar for additional line appearances No No Yes (additional cost) 1-gigabit port No - 100 mb/s Yes Yes Cisco Conference Phone Cisco 8832 - (conference phone) Technical Details Features Cisco 8832 # of lines 1 Max meeting attendees 26 1-gigabit port No Wireless mics Yes Misc VoIP Sidecar (Expansion Module) Technical Details Features Sidecar Info # of lines 36 Phone Compatibility Cisco 8851 Total Expansion Modules Possible 3 Pages 2 DoIT Supported Headsets Jabra Evolve2 30 Jabra Evolve2 40 Jabra Evolve2 55 Jabra Evolve2 65 Cisco 561/562 Technical Details Features Evolve2 30 Evolve2 40 Evolve2 55 Evolve 2 65 Cisco 561/562 Connectivity USB A/C USB A/C Bluetooth - USB A/C Bluetooth - USB A/C Bluetooth - USB A/C Wireless range N/A N/A Up to 30m/100ft Up to 30m/100ft Up to 30m/100ft Ringing base No No No No No Noise Cancellation No No Yes No Yes Speaker type 1 or 2 on ear 1 or 2 on ear 1 or 2 on ear 1 or 2 on ear 1 or 2 on ear Phone Compatibility 8851 8851 8851 8851 7841/8851
